title: ornithogalum shawii
intro: Ornithogalum shawii, also known as the Shaw's Star of Bethlehem, is a perennial plant native to the Cape Provinces of South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ornithogalum shawii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and combat infections, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Ornithogalum shawii typically involve infusing the plant's roots or leaves in water, which can then be used as a tea or applied topically as a poultice or salve.
